title: assignment did not succeed in always_ff when clk_gated driven

features.name: gated clock in always_ff sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with a gated clock signal in the posedge sensitivity list instead of an ungated clock
features.snippet: always_ff @(posedge clk_gated, negedge rst_n) begin if (rst_n == 1'b0) begin for (int i=0; i<8; i++) data[i] <= 1'b0; end else begin data[0] <= 1'b1; end end

features.name: for loop with non-blocking assignments in always_ff reset branch
features.description: Code should include a for loop with non-blocking assignments inside the reset branch of an always_ff block
features.snippet: always_ff @(posedge clk, negedge rst_n) begin if (rst_n == 1'b0) begin for (int i=0; i<DATA_DEPTH; i++) FIFO_REGISTERS[i] <= {DATA_WIDTH {1'b0}}; end end
